name: utopia-pubdev
description: Compose and standardize pub.dev READMEs for Utopia Dart/Flutter packages - brand-chip header, house voice, section structure, a restrained badge set, a no-sponsor footer with sibling links, and a tool-agnostic AI assistants section. Bundles the brand-chip header generator (package name to Clay PNG via headless Chrome).

interface.shortDescription: pub.dev README and brand standard for Utopia packages.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through composing and standardizing pub.dev READMEs for Utopia Dart/Flutter packages: the brand-chip header, house voice, minimal vs full section structure, a restrained badge set, a no-sponsor footer with sibling links, and a tool-agnostic AI assistants section. Bundles the brand-chip header generator (package name to Clay PNG via headless Chrome).
defaultPrompt: Write a pub.dev README for a Utopia package.
Refresh a package README to the Utopia brand standard.
